identity.vocalStyle: Aggressive, fast-paced, and emotionally charged with spoken word interludes
identity.styleSentence: A cinematic alternative-rock anthem with a tempo of 92.29 BPM, layered with gritty guitars, pounding drums, and atmospheric synths, capturing the raw energy of a post-party midnight scene filled with defiance and resilience.
identity.summary: The song is a powerful anthem of defiance and resilience, telling the story of overcoming adversity and transforming pain into strength, while rejecting weakness and embracing a battle-hardened identity.
